examples: The potentially fatal complication is called haemolytic uraemic syndrome (HUS).
Between onset of the outbreak through 15 June, there were 786 haemolytic uraemic syndrome (HUS) cases and 2517 EHEC infection cases in Germany.
Haemolytic uraemic syndrome (HUS) is a life-threatening disease characterized by acute renal failure (uraemia), haemolytic anaemia, and a low platelet count (thrombocytopenia).
Large numbers of people between the age of 16 and 60 have developed haemolytic uraemic syndrome (HUS).
The post-mortem revealed that Bethany had died from a rare complication of her E.coli infection, called Haemolytic Uraemic Syndrome.
